experiment: SCRATCH Retention Live Probe - Rule-18 Validation for Crit-A

key_findings.scratch_retention: ARM-C maintains all 32 recall sensors and 64 recall-to-vocal synapses perfectly stable across 1000 ticks (no mutation drift observed). The SCRATCH fabric is retained at full fidelity.
key_findings.addressing_circuit_retention: All 64 recall→vocal synapses (4 slots × 8 bits × 2 doubled connections) persist at exactly the seeded weight (128 silent). No pruning, no growth. The circuit is preserved but NOT potentiated above seed.
key_findings.delay2_accuracy: ARM-B shows brief delay-2 accuracy spike at tick 50 (13%) then collapses to ~0.3%. ARM-C shows similar profile (12.5% → 0.4%). This indicates the DELAY ring is populated but the STDP_TARGET teaching signal is NOT preferentially strengthening the slot-2 route over the echo (slot-0) trap.
key_findings.brain_growth: ARM-C has ~72% more neurons (76 vs 44) and ~206% more synapses (95 vs 31) due to the SCRATCH seed (32 recall sensors + 64 synapses). This is pure seed overhead — the extra tissue is maintained but not further elaborated by selection.
key_findings.energy_economy: ARM-C mean energy (33K) < ARM-B (40K) < ARM-A (43K). The SCRATCH overhead costs metabolic cycles (32 extra sensor reads/tick/organism) without generating additional reading income — confirming the uniform-income problem: recall sensors pay their ATP cost but earn no depth-band reward.
key_findings.survival: All three arms survive 1000 ticks (pop ~200-250). ARM-C has lower pop (195 vs 250) due to the metabolic tax of the SCRATCH fabric without compensatory income.

rule18_verdict.crit_a_load_bearing_assumption: FALSE - SCRATCH depth-2 addressing is NOT selected under uniform reading income.
evidence: Recall sensors and recall→vocal synapses are RETAINED (no mutation drift) - the fabric survives neutrally.
But slot-2→vocal weights do NOT grow above the seeded 128 (silent) level - no preferential potentiation of the correct delay-2 route.
Delay-2 accuracy collapses to ~0.4% in both ARM-B and ARM-C - the learner cannot discover the slot-2 address without a depth-band reward signal.
Uniform reading income pays the same per-byte regardless of prediction depth, so the metabolic cost of maintaining/addressing SCRATCH is not offset by any marginal gain.
rule18_verdict.implication: Crit-A (C(t) ≥25% sustained rise) REQUIRES an economy that rewards depth-2 context specifically. The current uniform books economy (gain = net_bits/8 * CELL_STATES with no depth factor) cannot drive the selection pressure needed to evolve/maintain the addressing circuit. Next step: implement depth-band reward (e.g., gain multiplier for delay-N solves) or peer-economy prediction market where depth-2 context predicts neighbour behaviour.
